localizations.title: The Curse on Camelot
localizations.hiddenObject_2: A figure to your right in the inn is watching you.
localizations.hint_71_first: A rather unusual symbol is engraved on one of the stones.
localizations.hint_71: This symbol features two interwoven numbers.
localizations.hint_12_first: Follow the will-o'-the-wisp to construct the forest in its proper sequence.
localizations.hint_12: The constructed forest panorama displays a mathematical formula.
localizations.hint_72_first: Follow the will-o'-the-wisp to construct the forest in its proper sequence.
localizations.hint_72: The constructed forest panorama displays a mathematical formula.
localizations.hint_5_first: Follow the will-o'-the-wisp to construct the forest in its proper sequence.
localizations.hint_5: The constructed forest panorama displays a mathematical formula.
localizations.hint_3_first: Follow the will-o'-the-wisp to construct the forest in its proper sequence.
localizations.hint_3: The constructed forest panorama displays a mathematical formula.
localizations.hint_6_first: The poem will help you decipher the symbols once the circle of stones is complete.
localizations.hint_6: For each paragraph of the poem, trace the path indicated by the elements described within them.  The word "it" also refers to a particular element.
localizations.hint_9_first: The poem will help you decipher the symbols once the circle of stones is complete.
localizations.hint_9: For each paragraph of the poem, trace the path indicated by the elements described within them.  The word "it" also refers to a particular element.
localizations.hint_57_first: You can find the three gates on the backs of some of the cards in your draw pile.
localizations.hint_57: One of Merlin's visions refers to these gates. Only one gate tells the truth, while the other two do not.
localizations.hint_18_first: You can take and move several items.
localizations.hint_18: Two elements of the decor in this room remind you of a symbol you saw earlier in the throne room.
localizations.hint_45: You need to follow the figure discreetly, using hiding spots that will completely shield you from view.
localizations.hint_63_first: What can you do with this axe? A spell will help you.
localizations.hint_63: Merlin mentions a battle axe in his visions.
localizations.hint_11_first: The creature has two weaknesses that you must identify.
localizations.hint_11: You have seen something resembling this creature before, near the beginning of your adventure.
localizations.hint_27_first: These symbols represent an invisibility spell cast by Morgana. To reveal Excalibur, you must lift the spell.
localizations.hint_27: Morgana snuck around the back alleys of Tintagel to inscribe these symbols, allowing her to cast her spell.
localizations.hint_64_first: The path Viviane shows you end at the shore, but can be found to continue elsewhere.
localizations.hint_64: Merlin had a vision about this path.
localizations.hint_52_first: The sword won't be effective against him. You are no match for the general, who is clad in armor made of gold.
localizations.hint_52: A spell can help you vanquish the general.
localizations.hint_49_first: You will not be able to pass through this fog without first lifting the spell.
localizations.hint_49: If you have the Dragon's Eye, you can either cast a spell, or undo a spell by casting a reversed version.
localizations.hint_41_first: Three ravens have been watching your movements throughout your adventure.
localizations.hint_41: Combine the ravens, then divide them in two to lift the spell.
localizations.hint_452_first: Gently bend reality by observing both sides of the lake.
localizations.hint_452: Look carefully at both sides of the card.
localizations.hint_23: The floor tiles feature the same symbols that Merlin is drawing.
localizations.hint_79: The runes that Merlin is drawing resemble those found on his study's floor tiles.
localizations.hint_73_first: Inside the game box, slide the position of two rooms to correctly place the new room within the dungeon.
localizations.hint_73: The new room is to be placed underneath room 56.
localizations.hint_68: The wax is soft enough to be pushed into holes.
localizations.hint_14: Use magic to sneak through the camp without drawing the soldiers' attention.
localizations.hint_36: You'll need to cast a spell to cross. Someone you've encountered has cast the spell you need.
localizations.hint_4: You will need to follow a trail of some kind to avoid getting lost in the forest.
localizations.hint_10_first: Even though the smoke conceals the number, the red color of the smoke reveals the card's color.
localizations.hint_10: You'll need a pliable material to fill these holes. Use one of your items in another room of the dungeon to create what you need.
localizations.hint_88: There is a creature hiding within the mountains. When the time comes, its strength will serve you well.
localizations.hint_86: Morgana has left information regarding Excalibur's location.
localizations.hint_60: The brazier in this room can be used to melt an object.
localizations.hint_65_first: You need to cast a spell on the fountain as described in Merlin's visions.
localizations.hint_65: To conjure water, you can create a new spell by combining words from two spells that you've previously cast.
localizations.hint_56: To activate the hidden mechanism, you will need to transform two rooms: one with an axe, and one that has something resembling the orb held by the queen.
localizations.hint_machine_25_part1: Morgana and the Saxons have captured a prisoner, and they seek to retrieve Excalibur. These two pieces of information are correlated.
localizations.hint_machine_25_part2: To counter Morgana's spell, you must use a word in her spell to cast a different one.
localizations.hint_machine_59_part1: Carefully examine the stone tablet to learn how to use Excalibur to win the battle.
localizations.hint_machine_59_part2: The stone tablet mentions awakening a dragon that can be used to fight your enemies. One of the cards conceals the dragon's location.
localizations.answer_hint_71: The numbers 6 and 9 are engraved on the stone.
localizations.answer_hint_12: Place the cards depicting the forest in the following order: 5, 12, 72, 3. This will form the mathematical formula 5 x 12 - 3.
localizations.answer_hint_72: Place the cards depicting the forest in the following order: 5, 12, 72, 3. This will form the mathematical formula 5 x 12 - 3.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Place the cards depicting the forest in the following order: 5, 12, 72, 3. This will form the mathematical formula 5 x 12 - 3.
localizations.answer_hint_3: Place the cards depicting the forest in the following order: 5, 12, 72, 3. This will form the mathematical formula 5 x 12 - 3.
localizations.answer_hint_6: Using the poem found in Merlin's study (91), connect the following symbols within the stone circle: Moon, Tree, Sun, Heart.  Then again, connecting the following symbols: Moon (implied by "it"), Dragon, Sun, Sword, Heart. These two paths will form the number 43.
localizations.answer_hint_9: Using the poem found in Merlin's study (91), connect the following symbols within the stone circle: Moon, Tree, Sun, Heart.  Then again, connecting the following symbols: Moon (implied by "it"), Dragon, Sun, Sword, Heart. These two paths will form the number 43.
localizations.answer_hint_57: One of Merlin's visions states, "Only one speaks the truth"; in other words, only one gate is truthful, while the others are lying. The gate that speaks the truth says "NOT THE GATE ON THE RIGHT." Take the card corresponding to this gate.
localizations.answer_hint_18: A coat of arms is engraved on the back of Arthur's throne (62). To recreate this symbol: first, take the candlestick and place it in the fireplace to ignite it. Then take the sword and place it in the fireplace.
localizations.answer_hint_63: To turn the battle axe into gold, as described by Merlin's vision, use the Dragon's Eye and say "Lapis Orum" aloud.
localizations.answer_hint_11: To slay the creature, replicate the damage found on the statue in Merlin's study (38). Use the sword (29) to sever its front right leg (+42) and neck (+15). +42 + 15 + 29 = 86.
localizations.answer_hint_27: These symbols are the runes drawn by Morgana throughout Tintagel used to cast her spell.  Access Machine 45 and erase these 3 runes from the card to undo the spell.
localizations.answer_hint_10: To fill the holes emitting the smoke, first melt the candle (20) using the brazier located in the previous room (+48). The smoke filling the room on card 10 is red, making it a red card. Therefore, you can combine the room with the melted wax (68). 10 + 68 = 78.
localizations.answer_hint_64: The path Viviane shows you is incomplete, but by using Merlin's visions (98) you can continue where the path leaves off.  Upon positioning the cards to complete the route, the number 52 becomes visible.
localizations.answer_hint_52: To defeat the Saxon general, turn his golden armor into stone. Use the Dragon's Eye and say "Orum Lapis" aloud.
localizations.answer_hint_49: Using the Dragon's Eye, you find the "Fogus Magika" spell, which enables you to conjure fog. Since spells can be reversed, to dispel the fog you must use the Dragon's Eye and say "Magika Fogus" aloud.
localizations.answer_hint_41: To lift the curse, you must gather the ravens then cut them in half. The ravens are on cards 62, 4, and 52. Combine their values, and then divide this total in half: (62 + 4 + 52) ÷ 2 = 59
localizations.answer_hint_452: To bend reality, gently bend the card to see both its front and back simultaneously, thereby obtaining the number 82.
localizations.answer_hint_23: Place the card with Merlin (79) next to the rune on the floor to form the number 35.
localizations.answer_hint_79: Place the card with Merlin (79) next to the floor to form the number 35.
localizations.answer_hint_73: To properly place the secret room, slide rooms 63 and 65 to the left so that they cover the stairs, ensuring they are positioned so that the doorways are lined up.
localizations.answer_hint_68: By using the melted wax, you can plug the holes that are emitting the smoke. While the number on card 10 is obscured, the smoke obscuring it is red, making it a red card. Thus, you can combine the room with the melted wax (68). 10 + 68 = 78.
localizations.answer_hint_14: To cross the Saxon camp without being seen, cast a spell to conjure fog. Use the Dragon's Eye and say "Fogus Magika" aloud.
localizations.answer_hint_36: To cross the water and reach Avalon, use the spell that you saw Viviane use (82) to walk on the water. Use the Dragon's Eye and say "Aqua Ambula" aloud.
localizations.answer_hint_4: Use the footsteps you found by resolving Machine 45 (+10) to guide you through the forest (4). 4 + 10 = 14.
localizations.answer_hint_86: The symbols on the artifact (27) are runes drawn by Morgana throughout Tintagel. Access Machine 45 and erase the 3 runes from this card.
localizations.answer_hint_60: To obtain melted wax, which can be used to plug the holes, use the candle (20) near the brazier (+48). 20 + 48 = 68.
localizations.answer_hint_65: Merlin saw an orb of water in his visions (98). This orb can be seen in the engravings on the fountain (65). To conjure water, you must craft a new spell, using words from spells you already know. "Magika" signifies conjuration, while "Aqua" means water. Use the Dragon's Eye and say "Aqua Magika" aloud.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_25_part1: The only person currently capable of pulling the sword from the stone is Arthur's niece Elaine, the young woman Morgana attempted to capture. Scan Elaine (47) with your device.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_25_part2: To counter Morgana's spell, you can harness water's natural energy. To word "Aqua" means water, and "Belia" signifies an attack. Use the Dragon's Eye and say "Aqua Belia" aloud.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_59_part1: When Elaine pulled Excalibur from the stone (1), some runes appeared. Refer to the stone tablet (83) to translate these runes. This will give you the following text: "wield Excalibur and say dragon awaken." Thus, you must wield your device so Excalibur is visible and say "Dragon, awaken" aloud.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_59_part2: The Dragon, which you now have the ability to control, is hiding within the mountains (88). Once you find it, you can command it to attack the Saxons (41) and stop the invasion. Use your device to scan card 88, followed by card 41.
localizations.machine_18: You place the sword into the lit fireplace, causing a hidden passageway to open.
localizations.machine_43: You reach the dungeon's exit and enter Morgana's secret chamber. Discard all dungeon cards.
localizations.machine_25: You counter Morgana's spell, creating an opening for Elaine to strike Morgana with her sword.
localizations.machine_59: Under the Dragon's ferocious fiery assault, the Saxons flee and escape the kingdom of Pendragon. Arthur reclaims his throne, and the Knights of the Round Table resume their positions around the table. They extend an invitation for you to join them, though Morgana's presence continues to cast a shadow over the kingdom.
localizations.machine_45_1: You lose sight of the figure you were tracking, but their footprints lead away from Tintagel into the forest.
localizations.machine_45_2: By erasing the runes, Morgana's curse is lifted and Excalibur materializes in Tintagel's town square, embedded within a stone.
localizations.machine_spell_1: The fog disperses, and you leave Camelot Castle.
localizations.machine_spell_2: You sneak through the fog to pass through the camp, but soon find yourself lost within Broceliande forest.
localizations.machine_spell_3: Your spell turns the general's gold armor into stone, encasing him inside.
localizations.machine_spell_4: Using Viviane's spell, you are able to walk on the water and reach Avalon.
localizations.machine_spell_5:
You conjure a flame to light the dungeon. Remove the insert from the bottom of the box and place card 60 inside the bottom of the box.
-
Make sure to play this part of the adventure in lighting conditions that allow the device to recognize the dungeon cards.
localizations.machine_spell_63: The battle axe engraved on the floor turns into gold.
localizations.machine_spell_65: You conjure water to fill the fountain.
localizations.machine_43_intro: The room is engulfed in darkness.
localizations.machine_43_card_61: Upon entering the room, a trap is suddenly triggered.
localizations.machine_43_card_56_1: The hands of the engraved queen gleam, yet nothing more happens.
localizations.machine_43_card_56_2: Upon entering the room once more, you are greeted by a loud clicking sound. The nearby rooms slide away, revealing a hidden chamber.
localizations.machine_43_card_63: A battle axe is engraved on the stone floor.
localizations.spell_no_mic_warning: If you're having trouble with speech recognition, you can turn it off. Are you sure you want to do this?
localizations.machine_25_1: Who is able to pull Excalibur from the stone?
localizations.machine_25_2: Elaine pulls the sword from the stone.
localizations.machine_25_3: As Elaine pulls Excalibur from the stone, Morgana steps out from the shadows and casts a fireball at her.
localizations.machine_43_end_desc: The nearby rooms slide away, revealing a hidden chamber.
localizations.machine_59_instructions: Defend the castle gates by repelling enemies.
localizations.machine_59_1: As the battle rages on, Elaine sustains an injury and drops Excalibur.
localizations.machine_59_2: Arthur commands "You must wield the sword now! Only Excalibur can save us!"
localizations.machine_59_3:
A loud roar echoes from afar.
But where is it coming from?
